title: The twigfr's roleplay modpack
description: This modpack focuses on creating a fantasy roleplay adventure for minecraft. This modpack features new bosses, weapons, creatures and more! This modpack also has an affect on world generation featuring mods like biomes from the biomes o plenty mod.
body:
This modpack aims to provide a fantasy feel and provides some new features to the game while not making it feel entireley diffirent.

Some new features include

九덢잺New Structures

九덢잺New Bosses

九덢잺New Weapons

九덢잺New armour

九덢잺DRAGONS!!!

九덢잺New Biomes

九덢잺New class system

九덢잺New Origins

Which when put together in a modpack makes a New Experience!
